post.subject: Indie Rock And Roll
post.body:
Im just up 10mins. Im going to work in 15mins. Working 30 hours in total this week. I work on the deli counter and it changes between being pretty busy to being really boring. But its certainly nice being back home. I fuckin' hate the store in Derry. 

I bought a DVD writer on sunday night, it arrived yesterday! I got it in and played around with it for a few hours, totally pissed off that I forgot to buy some blank DVDs after work yesterday, definately get some today, and if it works I will be renting some more DVDs later - also I wanna chat to hot girl in Xtra-Vision again...

I've been home since Friday and Im enjoying being home - mum's still a bitch, but I ignore her most of the time. Havent done a lot really, trying to go easy on my money. Still havent bought anyone anything for christmas yet... I guess internet shopping could be out of the question at this stage.
